      Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.

      Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.

      Returns an action that does nothing.

      Creates an action which retries given action.

      Action      		 Actions.retry(Class<T> targetExceptionClass, Action action, int times, long interval, TimeUnit timeUnit)

      Returns an action that waits for given amount of time.

      Creates an action object which times out after duration specified by given parameters.

    • Uses of Action in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions

      Subinterfaces of Action in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      interface  Composite
      An interface to represent an action which executes its members.
      interface  Concurrent
      An interface that represents a sequence of actions to be executed concurrently.
      interface  Conditioned 
      interface  Named
      An action that has a name.
      interface  Nested 
      interface  Piped<I,O>
      +--------+ source +---------+ | With |<>----+------->|Source| +--------+ | +---------+ | | | |sinks +---------+ | +------->|Sink[]| A +---------+ | +----------+ pipe +---------+ |Piped|<>--+------->|Pipe| +----------+ | +---------+ | |destinationSinks | +---------+ +------->|Sink[]| +---------+
      interface  Sequential
      An interface that represents a sequence of actions to be executed one after another.
      interface  TestAction<I,O> 
      interface  When 
      interface  While 
      interface  With<T> 
      Classes in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions that implement Action 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  ActionBase
      A skeletal base class of all Actions.
      class  Attempt<T extends Throwable>
      An action that corresponds to Java's try/catch mechanism.
      static class  Composite.Base
      A skeletal implementation for composite actions, such as Sequential.Impl or Concurrent.Base.
      static class  Concurrent.Base
      A class that represents a collection of actions that should be executed concurrently.
      static class  Conditioned.Base 
      class  ForEach<T>
      An action that is repeated on values given by an Iterable<T>.
      class  Leaf
      A skeletal base class of a simple action, which cannot be divided into smaller actions.
      static class  Named.Base
      A skeletal base class to implement Named action.
      static class  Nested.Base 
      static class  Piped.Impl<I,O> 
      class  Retry 
      static class  Sequential.Impl
      An implementation of Sequential action.
      class  Tag
      A tag action.
      static class  TestAction.Base<I,O> 
      class  TimeOut 
      static class  When.Impl 
      static class  While.Impl 
      static class  With.Base<T>
